migrations/003_add_missing_org_columns.s.rationale: Legacy backfill migration for membership schema bootstrap. Current access is enforced through the application membership helpers and later RLS/policy migrations, so this historical file is recorded as reviewed rather than rewritten.

migrations/013_email_system.sql.rationale: Operational email tables are service-owned delivery/suppression records. User access should flow through application endpoints, not direct table access.

migrations/047_whatsapp_channel_routing..rationale: Internal lock table used by channel processors for concurrency control. It is service-role only and not intended for browser/client reads.

migrations/047_whatsapp_channel_routing_.rationale: Historical fixed variant of the same internal chat-lock migration. The table is service-role only.
Historical production variant of the internal chat-lock migration. The table is service-role only.

Historical production variant of the internal chat-lock migration. The table is service-role only.
Historical production variant of the internal chat-lock migration. The table is service-role only.

migrations/056_inbound_dedup.sql.rationale: Internal idempotency table for inbound channel processing. Only trusted workers should write/read this table.

migrations/057_tenant_rate_buckets.sql.rationale: Internal rate-limit accounting table. Exposed tenant views should be derived through service endpoints.

migrations/059_tenant_encryption_keys.sq.rationale: Sensitive encryption metadata table. Direct client access must remain blocked; only server-side key services should read it.

migrations/061_conversation_summaries.sq.rationale: Worker-maintained summary cache. Product reads are mediated by assistant/conversation APIs.

migrations/062_phase1a_dedup_v2_and_bill.rationale: Usage accounting/idempotency table. It is service-owned and should not be directly exposed to clients.

migrations/084_agent_trades.sql.rationale: Historical trading event table. Runtime/API guards enforce access; direct client table access is not part of the product contract.

migrations/107_agent_commerce_foundation.rationale: Agent Commerce foundation tables hold credentials, policy, proofs, idempotency, and provider health. These are intentionally service-mediated until explicit RLS policies are added for user-visible slices.

migrations/supabase_marketplace_schema_S.rationale: Archived marketplace bootstrap schema kept for historical compatibility. Active product access now flows through current marketplace/template APIs.

migrations/supabase_marketplace_schema_U.rationale: Archived marketplace bootstrap schema kept for historical compatibility. Active product access now flows through current marketplace/template APIs.

supabase/migrations/20260309000000_agent.rationale: Trading event table used by server-side trading systems. Client access should be exposed through guarded trading APIs.

supabase/migrations/20260320160000_oauth.rationale: OAuth connection records contain sensitive integration metadata. Direct client table access should stay blocked and service-mediated.

supabase/migrations/20260320170000_assis.rationale: Assistant OAuth binding records are managed by integration services and should not be directly exposed to clients.

supabase/migrations/20260322200000_fix_c.rationale: Internal lock table used by channel processors for concurrency control. It is service-role only.

supabase/migrations/20260322200001_fix_c.rationale: Internal lock table used by channel processors for concurrency control. It is service-role only.

supabase/migrations/20260410190000_skill.rationale: Install artifact ledger for template/skill materialization. Product visibility is through install/reconcile APIs.

supabase/migrations/20260410193000_inter.rationale: Internal distributed lock table. It is only for trusted worker/control-plane coordination.

supabase/migrations/20260412160000_runti.rationale: Operational maintenance queue. User-visible state should be projected through Mission Control/API endpoints, not direct table reads.

supabase/migrations/20260427110000_chann.rationale: Routing control-plane data is currently managed by trusted channel APIs. Add table RLS before exposing direct user mutation surfaces.

supabase/migrations/20260427150000_imess.rationale: Hosted provider-plane operational tables for channel infrastructure. They are service-managed and not intended for direct client access.

migrations/012_workflows_system.sql.rationale: Legacy workflow cleanup migration; deletion targets orphaned execution rows after workflow deletion.

migrations/034_cleanup_orphaned_org_memb.rationale: Backfill cleanup removes orphaned membership rows whose organizations no longer exist.

supabase/migrations/20260324200001_rag_s.rationale: Migration bookkeeping repair for a superseded RAG scope migration version.
